free_text: Delta-E is a ~91 um fully depleted surface
barrier detector. E detector is consist of a Pd-Si
detector and a Si(Li) detector with 3 and 5 mm in
a+Au coulomb scattering cross section at 20 degree.
The main source of uncertainty is
statistical and the thickness of target.
was evaporated at a Au foil of 230 ug/cm2 in thickness.
